application_application_message.description: The message to show users when they are prompted to apply in the notification_channels

application_application_role_id.description: The role to give applicants when their application is approved

application_manage_role_ids.description: The roles required to manage the applications (not required to apply)

application_management_channel.description: The channel the application notifications and reminders should appear in

application_max_age.description: After this many days, the system will auto reject the applications

application_notification_channels.description: The channels that should receive periodic messages about the application, with a button to apply

application_notification_cron_config.description: CronTab for users being notified about the application

application_ping_role.description: The role to ping when a new application is created

application_reminder_cron_config.description: Crontab for executing pending reminder events

automod_alert_channel.description: The channel to send auto-protect alerts to

core_command_prefix.description: The prefix to use for legacy commands

core_enable_logging.description: Whether the botlogging module should be enabled. When disabled, core logs will all be turned off

core_nickname_filter.description: Whether to run the nickname filter or not

core_private_channels.description: A list of channels to exclude from logging events

core_guild_id.description: This is used as a validation tool, the guild ID that this config belongs to

duck_allow_manipulation.description: Controls whether release, donate, or kill commands are enabled

duck_cooldown.description: The amount of time in seconds to wait between bef/bang messages

duck_max_wait.description: The maximum number of hours to wait between duck events

duck_min_wait.description: The minimum number of hours to wait between duck events

duck_mute_for_cooldown.description: If enabled, users who miss will be timed out for the cooldown seconds

duck_spawn_user.description: A list of users allowed to use thje .duck spawn command

duck_timeout.description: The amount of time in seconds before the duck disappears

duck_use_category.description: Whether to use the whole category for ducks

dumpdbg_roles.description: Roles permitted to use the dump debug command

embed_embed_roles.description: Roles permitted to use the embed command
